title: Decoupling network frequency response
description: Bulk, ceramic, and small-value capacitors cover different frequency bands, and their parasitics set a self-resonant frequency.
body: Use when selecting a mix of decoupling capacitors for a supply rail. Do not rely on a single capacitor value, since each is only effective near its self-resonant frequency. Actions: combine bulk and high-frequency values, verify the network keeps supply impedance low across the band, and account for mounting inductance. Validation signals include a flat low supply impedance across the relevant frequencies and stable rails under transient load. Risk boundary: a gap in the impedance profile lets noise through at that frequency, so escalate to added values when a resonance falls in the operating band.
